privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real multispectral Landsat 7 imagery (verified via file metadata tags LANDSAT_LE7_TOA_5YEAR) downloaded from opengeos on GitHub. The data is saved to /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Output expectations require exporting an enriched BEAM-DIMAP file to /home/ga/snap_projects/urban_analysis.dim, a GeoTIFF of the footprint mask to /home/ga/snap_exports/urban_footprint.tif, and a text file of built-up index statistics to /home/ga/snap_exports/bui_statistics.txt, all verified via export_result.sh expected behaviors.
